layman_headline: Fear dominates crypto — no clear setup warrants risking capital right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in a fearful state with most altcoins in downtrends. Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.5%, meaning money is flowing away from smaller coins and into Bitcoin. While a few coins look oversold and could bounce, the charts are almost universally bearish with no confirmed reversal signals yet. It's better to wait for a cleaner setup than to catch a falling knife.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines with cash ready. Watch for Ethereum to pull back to the $1,800 support level — if it holds there with increasing volume and RSI dips below 35, that could be the entry point worth acting on.
expert_reasoning: Every swing candidate has significant headwinds. BONK has a -2.0 chart bias with Three Black Crows — a textbook falling knife. DEXE shows RSI at 71 (overbought) despite a -30% weekly drop, indicating a parabolic move that's now correcting violently. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but the risk/reward ratio is only 0.38x to resistance at $0.40 — terrible for a swing entry. ETH at RSI 39 with $1,800 support nearby is the best risk/reward setup, but the chart bias is still -0.70 with price below all major MAs. High BTC dominance (56.5%) continues to suppress alt performance. The prudent move is to wait for either RSI to dip below 30 (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate) or a confirmed reversal pattern before committing capital.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.5% continues to drain capital from altcoins — any alt entry faces structural headwind
Fear & Greed at 28 could drop further — fear environments often cascade before bottoming
Treasury market stress (per CryptoSlate) amplifying selloffs means macro risk remains elevated
watch_list: ETH RSI — if it drops below 30 at the $1,800 support level, that's a high-confidence oversold bounce setup
BTC dominance trend — a reversal below 55% would signal capital rotation back into alts
LDO momentum — if it consolidates above $0.35 and builds a bull flag, it could offer a continuation entry
market_context: The crypto market sits in a fear regime (28/100) with BTC dominance at 56.5%, creating a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades. BTC itself is relatively stable around $64.5K but alts are bleeding, and no confirmed reversal patterns have emerged yet.
context_banner: Market fear and high BTC dominance make this a capital preservation moment — patience will be rewarded with a cleaner entry.

key_signals.description: RSI is our most reliable signal (80% win rate). ETH at 39 is approaching but not yet in the high-conviction oversold zone below 30 — waiting for confirmation.
Fear & Greed at 28 ('Fear') with flat trend suggests we haven't hit capitulation yet — bottom-fishing is premature.
ETH derivatives reset article suggests leverage washout is underway, which typically precedes bounces but requires price confirmation.
Treasury market stress amplifying crypto selloffs — macro headwind remains active and could push prices lower.
BONK shows Three Black Crows (-2.0 bias), LDO shows Three White Soldiers (+0.85) but with terrible 0.38x R:R — no candidate offers both bullish structure AND favorable entry.
